# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Pigeon is a small local-first project. Security fixes land on the latest minor release line; older lines are best-effort.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 6.2.x   | Yes                |
| 6.1.x   | Best-effort        |
| < 6.1   | No                 |

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please **do not** open a public GitHub issue for security reports.

Use GitHub's [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/2nspired/pigeon/security/advisories/new) — go to the **Security** tab on the repo and click **Report a vulnerability**. Reports are visible only to the maintainer and to anyone you invite as a collaborator on the advisory.

When you report, please include:

- A description of the issue and the impact (what an attacker could do).
- Steps to reproduce, or a proof-of-concept.
- Affected versions.
- Any suggested mitigations.

## Response time

- **Acknowledgment:** within 48 hours of receiving the report.
- **Initial triage / severity assessment:** within 7 days.
- **Fix or mitigation timeline:** communicated at triage; depends on severity.

We'll credit reporters in the release notes unless you'd prefer to stay anonymous — just say so in the report.
